2962194.title: De Casagrandes
2962194.description: Bobby loopt over van de goede ideeën als het op de mercado aankomt, maar Hector is er niet van gecharmeerd en wijst hem bot af. // Ronnie Anne houdt een slaapfeestje voor haar vrienden, Carl dwingt af dat hij en Adelheid ook mee mogen doen.

2977922.title: De Casagrandes
2977922.description: When Ronnie Anne realizes that she's not up to date on all of the latest trends, she seeks help from Carlota. // Bobby struggles to find Sergio after wishing he would fly away and never come back.

2978683.title: De Casagrandes
2978683.description: Carlota worries that her family will embarrass her after her vlog is discovered by a famous musician. // Hector becomes Ronnie Anne and Carl's newest classmate after deciding to finish his schooling.

2982195.title: De Casagrandes
2982195.description: The family tries to help Bobby get over his test taking anxieties. // Carl gets lost in the city zoo after sneaking away from his family, in search of Keyon, the Komodo dragon.

2989137.title: De Casagrandes
2989137.description: Ronnie Anne and Sid try to take down the obnoxious burger restaurant that opened up across the street. // After picking Par as his new best friend, Bobby realizes he may be in over his head.

2989234.title: De Casagrandes
2989234.description: Ronnie Anne thinks her grandparent's marriage is in trouble after watching a relationship talk show. // Ronnie Anne learns the art of baile folklorico - and that her Tia Frida is one intense instructor!

3001822.title: De Casagrandes
3001822.description: Ronnie Anne tries to convince her Dad to move to the city while he is visiting. With the help of Sid, she devices a plan that seems too good to fail.

3006906.title: De Casagrandes
3006906.description: Ronnie Anne and Sid are pumped up for their sleepover, but Carl and Adelaide might ruin the day! // After a disagreement with Abuelo, Bobby goes to work for Mr. Hong to try out his new business ideas.

3018572.title: De Casagrandes
3018572.description: When they find a treasure map, the Casagrandes go on a wild search for Pancho Villa's gold. // Frida and Carlos go on a fancy plane ride, but Carl and CJ try to sneak on for an adventure of their own.

3018653.title: De Casagrandes
3018653.description: When Ronnie Anne finds out her Tio Carlos was a famous skateboarder, she begs him to teach her some new moves. // In order to buy a new skateboard, Ronnie Anne and Sid start a dog-walking business that quickly gets out of hand.

3024626.title: De Casagrandes
3024626.description: Bobby struggles to give up control of the mercado during his pizza-versary date with Lori. // When Ronnie Anne notices that she's the only person Carlitos won't copy, she's determined to change it!

3025598.title: De Casagrandes
3025598.description: Bobby brengt spullen naar buurjongen Alexis voor z'n verjaardagsfeestje. Er is een goochelaar en Bobby mag blijven kijken. // Great Lakes City houdt een hotdog wedstrijd. De winnaar krijgt een reis naar Wenen.

3027499.title: De Casagrandes
3027499.description: The Changs go on vacation and leave Ronnie Anne and her cousins to watch after Cam, the chameleon snake. // Ronnie Anne and her skate buddies work together to show their coach that they have what it takes to make a team.

3030335.title: De Casagrandes
3030335.description: Celebrity psychic Ernesto Estrella deems Great Lakes City to be bad luck and Abuela believes him!

3040214.title: De Casagrandes
3040214.description: Ronnie Anne and Sid look for an after-school activity to do together, but nothing seems to be right for them both. // When Maria finally gets a day off, Ronnie Anne has to compete with her family for some much-needed quality time.

3040280.title: De Casagrandes
3040280.description: Ronnie Anne forgoes a family Halloween tradition for a "cool" party but learns "cool" doesn't always mean "fun." / Trying to help Adelaide to get over the death of her frog, Ronnie Anne and Sid teach her about Day of the Dead.

3045869.title: De Casagrandes
3045869.description: Abuela worries that Ronnie Anne and Bobby will want to live at their Dad's new apartment permanently. // Carl hosts a haunted tour based on Abuela's tale of "El Cucuy," and learns that this story may not be fiction.

3006467.title: De Casagrandes
3006467.description: Carl's liefde voor speelgoed zorgt ervoor dat hij filmpjes gaat maken over het uitpakken ervan. // Frida exposeert in de galerie van Romeo en haar kunst zal geveild worden voor het goede doel.

3048432.title: De Casagrandes
3048432.description: Abuela teaches Ronnie Anne that getting ingredients for dinner is no small task. // When Vito's apartment floods, the kids try to find an apartment that suits him best.

3050752.title: De Casagrandes
3050752.description: After a magician hypnotizes Bobby into thinking he's a cat, the family needs to snap him out of it! // Ronnie Anne and her friends uncover a town mystery: what happened to Bruno's hot dog cart?

3011389.title: De Casagrandes
3011389.description: The family discovers an amazing tamale cart and tries to keep it a secret from Abuela. // Ronnie Anne doesn't believe in an astrological prediction that "love will find her," until it seems to come true.

3011700.title: De Casagrandes
3011700.description: Ronnie Anne is determined to help CJ get onstage at a Pirate Dinner Show. // Ronnie and Sid have to decide whether they "borrow" money from a lost coin purse they found in the mercado.

3064269.title: De Casagrandes
3064269.description: When Ronnie Anne realizes that she's not up to date on all of the latest trends, she seeks help from Carlota. // Bobby struggles to find Sergio after wishing he would fly away and never come back.

3067206.title: De Casagrandes
3067206.description: Adelaide and Carl have an adventure on Mr. Chang's route, but can they work together to save the day? // When Mama Lupe comes to visit, Abuela tries to get her family at the top of their cultural game.

3070021.title: De Casagrandes
3070021.description: Carl's love for toys gets him caught up in a whirlwind toy review career. // Frida's art gets a bad review, the kids try to stage a new auction to lift her spirits.

3020513.title: De Casagrandes
3020513.description: The family tries to help Bobby get over his test taking anxieties. // Carl gets lost in the city zoo after sneaking away from his family, in search of Keyon, the Komodo dragon.

3037957.title: De Casagrandes
3037957.description: When Bobby finds out Carl can't swim, he offers to show him the ways of the waves! // After begging Abuelo for some A/C, the cousins decide to earn some cash at the neighborhood fair.

3043712.description: Ronnie Anne en Bobby vinden een oud jaarboek van Maria's school. // Carlota is in de leer bij Margarita om een certificaat te halen voor make-up en haarstylist.

3043770.title: De Casagrandes
3043770.description: Wanneer ze een schatkaart vinden, gaan de Casagrandes snel op zoek naar het goud van Pancho Villa. // Frida en Carlos gaan op een vliegreis, maar Carl en CJ proberen mee te gaan om zelf op avontuur te kunnen.

3062032.description: Ronnie Anne ontdekt dat oom Carlos stiekem 's nachts haar skateboard pakt en gaat skaten. // Ronnie Anne en Sid bieden aan om de honden van de buren uit te laten. Van het geld willen ze dingen kopen die ze graag willen hebben.

3062820.title: De Casagrandes
3062820.description: Ronnie Anne en Sid moeten een naschoolse activiteit kiezen. Ze willen per se bij dezelfde club, maar wat ze leuk ivnden verschilt nogal. // Maria heeft Ronnie Anne beloofd dat ze op haar vrije dag samen dingen gaan doen.
